conservative.name: Quick-Quick, Kill-Kill!
conservative.requirements:
Used by: Gutter Runner
Ranged weapon equipped, target within close range

success.description: The sneaky gutter runner unleashes a quick ranged attack, hoping to catch its target off-guard. The attack inflicts normal damage
As above, the GM may add 1 recharge token to any one of the target's actions

boon.description: The attacker may immediately perform a manoeuvre after this action is completed

bane.description: The target may immediately perform a manoeuvre after the attacker completes this action

sigmarsComet.description: The attacker may immediately make a Basic Ranged Attack after this action is completed

reckless.name: Quick-Quick, Kill-Kill!
reckless.requirements: Ranged weapon equipped, target within close range

success.description: You unleash a quick ranged attack, hoping to catch its target off-guard. The attack inflicts normal damage
As above, the GM may add 1 recharge token to any one of the target's actions

bane.description: The target may immediately perform a manoeuvre after you complete this action

sigmarsComet.description: You may immediately make a Basic Ranged Attack after this action is completed
